structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for VAV Reheat Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper full closed/open; force heating to OFF/closed; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify software switches exist to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper full closed/open; force heating to OFF/closed; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force damper full closed/open, f. force heating to OFF/closed, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force damper full closed/open, f. force heating to OFF/closed, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force damper full closed/open, f. force heating to OFF/closed, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode as defined in Table 5.6.4. For example, cooling maximum is Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; zero in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Heating minimum is Max(Vheat-min, min*) in Occupied, Vheat-min in Cooldown, zero in Setup, Vheat-max in Warmup and Setback, zero in Unoccupied.
